desc._value: Fix up the Dimensional Schisms and save Ludibrium from approaching danger.
Defeat Lord Pirate and rescue the kidnapped Wu Yang.
Help Romeo and Juliet, and resolve the conflict between the Alcadno and Zenumist Societies.
Help Shammos re-seal Rex the Hoblin King.
Defeat the Dragon Rider and reveal its true identity.
Protect the Obelisk of Nett and overcome the trials.

desc._value: Test your strength in Mu Lung Dojo.
Protect Kenta from the ferocious sea creatures.
Rescue the explorers locked up in the Hidden Tower of the Lion King's Castle.
Undo Jun's curse by defeating the Ice Knight.
Explore the secret of Forgotten Altar though Battle statue.
Participate in Cross World Party Quests, which change every 2 weeks!

desc._value: Explore the Ghost Ship in the Sea of Fog and defeat the Cursed Captain.
Go admire the paintings over at Spiegelmann's Gonzo Gallery.
Test your strength against others at the Battle Square.
Why don't you check out the amazing Evolution System?
Who's the dimensional invader?
This is Spiegelmann's guest house. From here, you can access the <Moon Bunny's Rice Cake>, <First Time Together>, <The Ice Knight's Curse>, and <Dimensional Crack> party quests.
This is Spiegelmann's guest house. From here, you can access the <Forest of Poison Haze>, <Romeo and Juliet>, <Remnant of the Goddess>, and <Lord Pirate> party quests.
Within the walls of Spiegelmann's Guest House, you'll find residents who allow you to enter any Party Quest you want!
Welcome to <Cooking with Tangyoon>. It's time for you to learn how to run a kitchen like a boss!
Eliminate the remainder of Hilla's forces in the Azwan area.
Venture to the Golden Temple to defeat Ravana the Demon.
Experience a past story at the Grand Athenaeum.
Create a party and enjoy a special mission.
Play party quests with heroes from other worlds.
Battle the seal guardians to weaken them. The future of Maple World is in your hands.\r\n
The war against the Black Mage has officially begun with the continental conference for the creation of a Maple Alliance.
Conquer the underwater tower known as the Tower of Oz to help Alicia's Soul.
Massive EXP and different daily rewards await you!
Experience FriendStory, the first spin-off of MapleStory!
Defeat Fallen Cygnus (Easy).
Experience MapleStory's second epic, Heroes of Maple!
Challenge Maplerunner!
Strange energy emanates from the crashed spaceship. Clear 5 stages within the time limit to earn Bonus EXP based on the rank you get!
The land of commerce, Commerci Republic. What kind of adventure awaits you there?

슈피겔만의 고스트파크,
당신은 어느 레벨까지 버틸 수 있을까?!
파왕 우르스의 위엄에 도전해보지 않겠나?
